title: Manage a permaculture aid and development project
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage a permaculture aid and development project demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Obtain information on aid project

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Contact peak aid organisation or agency to obtain information about aid projects.
